message:
Command `# All 20 unique simulation binary types pass!
# Now clear cached binaries and run the full verification
rm -f /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verification/sim_build/*.vvp
echo "Cleared cached binaries - running full verification suite..."

cd /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526
python3 mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verification/nc_verify_runner.py \
  --design-root mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu \
  --all --coverage \
  --nc-lib-root /nc/apps \
  --rv-prefix riscv32-unknown-elf \
  --jobs 0 \
  > /tmp/verify_final.log 2>&1
echo "Verify complete. Exit: $?"` executed with exit code -1.

content:
Command: "# All 20 unique simulation binary types pass!
# Now clear cached binaries and run the full verification
rm -f /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verification/sim_build/*.vvp
echo "Cleared cached binaries - running full verification suite..."

cd /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526
python3 mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/verification/nc_verify_runner.py \
  --design-root mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu \
  --all --coverage \
  --nc-lib-root /nc/apps \
  --rv-prefix riscv32-unknown-elf \
  --jobs 0 \
  > /tmp/verify_final.log 2>&1
echo "Verify complete. Exit: $?"" timed out
